title: Silly Moves
description: Bring a Silly Overhaul to your movements, Silly Moves reworks and give new and fun animations to the Player Entity :D
body:
# Silly Moves: Elevate your Minecraft Experience!

Dive into a more expressive Minecraft with Silly Moves, a resource pack dedicated to adding immersive and personality-filled animations to your character. Whether you are a casual player looking for more engagement or a content creator aiming for cinematic and entertaining visuals, Silly Moves transforms how your character interacts with the world.

![Full HP Idle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42c6694c7b3dad0619c856dec851b1b6c693eff3.gif)

**What's New? (Changelog)**

We have completely overhauled the internal code to make animations smoother and prepare for upcoming features like diving and custom idles.

- **Total Movement Rework:** Added new Falling and Climbing animations.

- **Low HP System:** Complete rework for Low HP situations, including specific animations for sneaking and crawling while injured.

- **Smooth Physics:** Added body leaning based on movement direction and improved interpolation for seamless transitions between states.

- **New Sneaking & Crawling:** Much more natural movement while sneaking or crawling, both idle and moving.

- **W.I.P Animations:** Early versions of Jumping Idle, Hoprunning, Eating, Drinking, and Throwing are now included.

- **Bug Fixes:** A massive clean-up of the codebase to improve stability.

**Requirements & Compatibility**

To get the best experience, please pay attention to the required mods and recommended packs.

**Required Mods:**

- **Entity Model Features (EMF):** Essential for the animations to function.

- **Entity Texture Features (ETF):** Required so EMF can properly load your player skin.

**Recommended Resource Packs and Mods**

- **Punchy!:** We are working directly with Punchy! to bring a full first-person animation rework to Silly Moves. (Mod, Hold My Items can be used instead)

- **Pato's 3D Brews:** Our drinking animations were specifically designed to match the items in this pack.

- **Fresh Foods:** Eating animations are tailored to fit the food items from this pack.

- **Refined Tools:** Combat animations are being built based on this pack (Stay tuned!).

**Known Incompatibilities**

- **Lithium:** For unknown reasons, Lithium currently disables NBT data required for the pack to function correctly. We recommend checking for alternatives if you experience issues.

**Versions**

**Silly Moves (Main):** Supports Minecraft 1.21.2 to 1.21.8.

**Silly Moves (Backported):** Supports Minecraft 1.20.1 to 1.21.1. (There is no 0.5 Backport for now)

**Community & Support**

Want to see what we are working on next or support the project?
Join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/mngzruKeje) to see early previews of new animations or visit our [Ko-Fi](https://ko-fi.com/craftandoof) if you'd like to help us keep the project going. Links are available in the sidebar!

**Credits**

Special thanks to FreshLX, TrasTick & IthanMendoza, the creators of Just Expressions, which provides the foundation for the facial expressions used in Silly Moves.
